title: Marathon Launch already gave Bungie a Panic Attack
description:
Marathon has officially launched today, a few days after the recent 'Server Slam' event, and we're already seeing lots of duality in opinions on both the data coming out as well as the gameplay itself. In this video we'll briefly go over some of the main points of contention from Day 1.
